title: <div><tt>| `PRT_PROMPTKIT` | Prompt Library | Grouped prompts for creative or B2
content:
| `PRT_PROMPTKIT` | Prompt Library | Grouped prompts for creative or B2B use | Digital product |
| `PRT_SYLLABUS` | Course Skeleton | Pedagogical map for cross-discipline use | Curriculum / Teaching |
| `PRT_ZINE` | Mini-Publication | Stylized PDF/ePub narrative | Pay-what-you-want / Print |
| `PRT_SLIDEDECK` | Visual Framework | Public/Private deck of a thread/system | Workshop / Internal Tool |
| `PRT_UI_MOCKUP` | Interface Preview | Visualized ritual/process layer | App pitch / Investor deck |
| `PRT_AUDIO_MODULE` | Sound-based output | Ambient, vocal, musical or generative | Streaming / NFT / BGM |
| `PRT_ARG_PACKET` | Game Logic Drop | Fictional/surreal lore bundle | Immersive experience |
| `PRT_SPELLBOOK` | Conceptual Compendium | Symbolic / mythic / idea cluster | Collector object |
| `PRT_MIRROR_DOC` | Persona-based Explainer | System reflection through real user lens | Coaching / Client |
| `PRT_ARCHIVE_OBJECT` | Fossilized Thread | Locked version of a project or session | Study object / Art piece |
